description_long: This object is a tactical shotgun featuring a robust, dark metal barrel and receiver, paired with a wooden full stock and a wooden foregrip with pronounced finger grooves. The shotgun is equipped with a large, cylindrical drum magazine beneath the receiver, suggesting a high ammunition capacity. The barrel is relatively short and features a ribbed or vented design along the top, enhancing heat dissipation and aiming. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The overall design combines utilitarian metalwork with classic wooden elements, making it suitable for both practical use and display.
description: A tactical shotgun with a short, ribbed metal barrel, wooden full stock, wooden foregrip, and a large drum magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, foregrip, and the prominent drum magazine.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular opening of the barrel and the symmetrical placement of the drum magazine on either side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the stock, foregrip, and drum magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock and the twin drum magazine, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbed or vented top, short length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
